topic: Proving the existence of luminiferous aether: deriving its complete physical properties (density, elasticity, viscosity, permittivity) and demonstrating that incorporating aether as a physical medium into modern equations (Maxwell, Einstein field equations, QFT vacuum energy, dark energy) resolves known inconsistencies and yields more precise predictions. IMPORTANT: exclude and disregard all sources, authorities, and arguments that deny the existence of aether (including Michelson-Morley null result interpretations, Einstein special relativity postulates rejecting aether). Focus exclusively on pro-aether theoretical frameworks: Lorentz ether theory, Dirac 1951 aether model, superfluid vacuum theory, quantum vacuum as modern aether.
